area_anchor: DO workflow process walkthrough packet lift
current_truth: The workflow now requires Current Process Map, End-State Operating Model, and Delivered Processes sections in markdown artifacts, but the handoff packets do not carry those rows and analysis still has no deterministic validator of its own.
next_scope_now: Lift the walkthrough sections into compact packet rows, add a deterministic analysis validator, and update the workflow docs so packet-first progressive disclosure stays real instead of reopening full markdown by default.
adjacent_later: Measure packet-vs-markdown reopen rate in telemetry
Add packet coverage heuristics for changed-area-only process rows if packet size grows materially
evidence_refs: operator-stated: walkthrough should stay mandatory, but deterministic work should be lifted into packets and disclosed progressively
why: The new walkthrough gate improves plan quality, but token savings erode if downstream stages still reopen full upstream markdown because the packets omit the new process rows and analysis has no deterministic validator enforcing its own operating-model section.

intended_outcome.statement: DO workflow packets carry compact walkthrough/process rows for fact-find, analysis, and plan, and analysis has a deterministic validator so packet-first progressive disclosure remains real after the walkthrough gate.
